title: Psql -h -U -d -c CREATE (Local)
description: Psql -h -U -d -c CREATE command for postgresql workflows in local mode.
command: psql -h [HOST] -U [USER] -d [DB_NAME] -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;"
